response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud platforms (AWS), and relevant work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his AI experience is implied rather than deeply documented.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong cloud and full-stack background with AWS, Docker, and scalable systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring via workshops
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production-grade GenAI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph), or AI evaluation pipelines
